posts.title: A year of releases in review
posts.description: Over the past year, Keystone has received numerous updates, new features, and essential bug fixes.

posts.title: Use Keystone in Next.js applications
posts.description: Guide on integrating Keystone with Next.js apps and deploying to Vercel.

posts.title: Introducing the Keystone Blog
posts.description: Launch announcement for the Keystone Blog as a central hub for team news.

posts.title: Long awaited Singleton has arrived
posts.description: Introduction of Singleton feature for managing single object lists.

posts.title: Keystone now supports MySQL
posts.description: Announcement of MySQL database provider support.

posts.title: Keystone learning series
posts.description: New educational series covering blog backend development with relationships and auth.

posts.title: Customisable Admin UI
posts.description: Release featuring custom navigation, pages, and logo theming.

posts.title: Prisma Day 2021 Talk
posts.description: Conference presentation on Keystone 6's features and flexibility.

posts.title: How to embed Keystone + SQLite in a Next.js app
posts.description: Tutorial on embedding Keystone with SQLite in Next.js for GraphQL endpoint deployment.
